'''Breyf T'dawlish''' was a white furred [[Bothan/Legends|Bothan]]. He was one of the [[Confederation]] hosts who greeted "[[Lumiya|Silfinia]]" and "[[Darth Caedus|Najack Ell]]" at the supposed meeting at [[Gilatter VIII]].

==Appearances==
*''[[Legacy of the Force: Exile]]'' {{1st}}

==Sources==
*<!-- 2008-12-09 -->''[[The Complete Star Wars Encyclopedia]]''
